reviews.review_description: Not as good as it seems

All I see is my hands and a blue screen on Quest 3.
Sorry guys, but I can't rate it better yet.

Update:
The game finally starts on Quest 3, it's quite good but I can hardly find any players, so I only give it four stars. I'll wait a bit longer

developer_response.body:
Much thanks for your patience and understanding!^^ We appreciate you updated review and are delighted to hear that the issue has been resolved. We're actively working to grow our player base by updating our game mechanic into something way more exciting. Please satay tuned and we hope to see you soon!^^

blessings,

reviews.review_description: I can’t wait to get my friends to join me or download it. I tell everyone about this game since I’ve found it

developer_response.body:
I love that you found our game and loved it. We are just getting started and it will get a lot more fun. We'll be adding friends invite feature by the end of this year for you to enjoy with your friends. Thanks for the kind words and we'll keep swimming!^^
blessings,

reviews.review_description:
I feel like I'm in the last top 3 of the battle royale
Gun manipulation is a bit casual, but not bad
It's a game that I'm looking forward to developing
If your looking for a FPS, this isn't it.

What does that say about the finished product?  I know a lot of the times there isn’t many people working on these games. However; when you have it set up for in game purchases. I lose interest fast. Game is glitchy, screen is jumpy. Definitely a ton of work still needed. Yet that hand is already out for free money. Reasons why I stopped playing so many games, that ruin themselves this way. Greed rears its ugly head, but the game isn’t worth the bucks.

developer_response.body: Hmm. This is deep and to the core. We're sorry that you've experienced such inconveniences. And we're dealing this through trial and error ourselves. We also know we have a long way to go as well. But we keep swimming and plan to get this polished and nice so if you would stay tuned for more udpates, that would be great. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: It's so much fun to watch players get shot by other players while trying to run away with the money bag that I didn't even realize the time was up. When you fortunately take the money bag , you have to run away immediately, but it's so nerve-wracking when they chase you to get it. I think it will be even more fun when the user pool is bigger and more active.

developer_response.body: Thrilled to hear you're finding the game exciting! We're actively working to grow the user base, and we can't wait for more players to join in on the action. Your support means the world to us. Thanks^^ 🎮

reviews.review_description: Even in the early stages of development, there's high anticipation due to the unique concept.
Doesnt start, all i see is a blue screen and i hear music. Nothing else happens

developer_response.body:
Hello,

Thank you for flagging the issue with Bounty City. We're super sorry for the inconvenience.

If it's okay, would you provide more details about the problem? Your insights are crucial for us to fix it. If you're open to it, let's chat on Discord for a quicker resolution, please?

Discord Link: https://discord.gg/BcvkmvdJGy

Appreciate your help!
blessings,

reviews.review_description: Team death match with a goal to keep the money bag as long as possible, the game was fun however the lobby was empty, get the word out it is a fun game and plays pretty good, a few comments for the dev, we need more female avatars just saw the one, and second since you can't two hand stabilize your gun while holding the money bag maybe make the virtual stock better or less recoil,  other than that bring some friends in and have some fun, get the word out about this game so there will be people in the lobbies, nice big environments,  gameplay was good, not complicated I think it may get repadative after a wholesome maybe some different modes you can select in a private lokky like turning off the bag location

I actually really enjoy the concept of the game, and the game modes. However, i was kind of disappointed, when I felt no vibrations in the controllers while shooting. I understand that this is in early access, and I will definitely keep an eye out for future updates.

When this game gets manual reloading (more than just inserting a magazine), and gets a higher playerbase, this game will definitely be 5 stars.

Also, me and my friend had very tall characters. Might be the height calibration, too low roofs, or too large player models, but we had to crouch a little/tilt our heads to get through doors (keep in mind, we are both around 170 cm/5'7/)

developer_response.body:
Dear Joky-VR,

Thank you for your feedback and sorry for the initial quality issues you experienced. Over the past five months, we have worked diligently to improve the game. We have now officially launched the updated version and would love for you to give it another try when you have the time.

Thank you for your patience and support.

Best regards,
SGEntertech

reviews.review_description: Decent foundations for a better game moving forward

reviews.review_title: VR FPS game with some potentials
reviews.review_description: I've been following this game since early access. If more users are engaging in this game, this game would be more enjoyable.

The game was not intuitive and felt clunky. Movement mechanics were weird and there were no other players on, Could only play bots. Doesn’t seem to have the player base yet. It was hard to tell where your gun was firing.

developer_response.body:
Dear worrisomesheep.nb,

Thank you for your feedback and sorry for the initial quality issues you experienced. Over the past five months, we have worked diligently to improve the game. We have now officially launched the updated version and would love for you to give it another try when you have the time.

Thank you for your patience and support.

Best regards,
SGEntertech

reviews.review_description:
Great Game! Very fun to play with friends. Good job! 

However I think the gun models are too big, and you should implement a system where you can change where the layout of guns/ammo is. And the guns, should have a better reloading system.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the positive feedback and for enjoying the game! We appreciate your suggestions regarding gun models and reloading systems. We'll definitely consider these for future updates. Stay tuned for more improvements^^

reviews.review_description: It is a good game but it needs more players

developer_response.body: Dear vrpenguin.2024, thank you for playing our game! We appreciate your suggestions. We are looking forward to initiate few updates to make this game more user-oritented before the official launch. Stay tuned for more improvements^^

reviews.review_description: Really good shooter game

I saw this game from BMF channel.

I liked the quite enjoyed casually designed characters.
Gamemode was quite unique.
I saw that this game is quite similar to The Finals, PC FPS.
Earning points by holding the bag makes me feel the similarity btw this and The Finals.
I guess it is new gamemode since I saw on BMF video was different.
but I liked it better actually.

I saw some of bugs though.
but I understood since this game is early access.
Keep up Devs! 
I look forward to see how this game improves!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for trying out our game and for your positive feedback! We're glad you enjoyed the characters and found our game mode appealing. We appreciate your understanding of the early access stage, and we're committed to addressing bugs and continuously improving the game. Stay tuned for exciting updates, and we hope you enjoy the evolving experience! 🚀
